prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: POLISHVAR-PARENT Product Type: ABRASIVES Brand (from catalog): Universal Existing Title: Metal Polish Compound Stick Clean Buff Metal Items Remove Oxidation (4 Types) Description: Polish all of your metal items with the Universal Metal Polishing Compounds.

These polishing compound sticks are a great addition to any household or workshop. Each container comes with a solid stick of polishing compound - #5 and #6 are 3.2oz each, #1 and #4 are 2.2oz each.

The #6 compound is a high gloss polish, suitable for all metals including hard, soft and precious. It will create a high gloss finish - just attach it to your buffing wheel and watch your metals become super glossy.

The #5 compound is a light gloss polish, and also is suitable for all metals. It will easily remove oxidation and give your metal items a light gloss sheen.

The #4 compound is designed for use with precious metals only. It is ideal for regular cleaning, and will remove burs, corrosion and scratches.

The #1 compound is designed for use with hard metals only. It is also ideal for regular cleaning, and will also remove burs, corrosion and scratches.

Make sure to grab one of these compound sticks depending on which kind of metals you need polished.

Please note: this listing is for (1) polishing compound of your choice, not all 4. Search Terms: metal polish compound liquid cleaning motorcycle quick clean car gun heavy duty bike Features: - #6 Compound: High Gloss Polish | 3.2 oz | All Metals - #5 Compound: Light Gloss Polish | 3.2 | All Metals - #4 Compound: Precious Metal Polish | 2.2 oz | Precious Metals Only - #1 Compound: Hard Metal Polish | 2.2 oz | Hard Metals Only - Ideal for Regular Use === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Metal Polish Compound Stick - 4 Types

anthropic.title_differentiation: High Gloss And Light Gloss Polish, All Metals And Precious Metals, Remove Oxidation And Corrosion, Buffing Wheel Ready

openai.title_differentiation: High Gloss Finish, Removes Oxidation, For All Metals, Regular Use, 32 Oz Or 22 Oz, Four Compound Types
